title: AI 2040 and the cult of intelligence
summary: 文章探讨了AI在2040年的发展前景，批判了当前对AI的盲目崇拜，认为AI技术被过度神化，实际进展可能不如预期，并呼吁理性看待AI的能力与局限。
highlights: The cult of intelligence blinds us to the real limitations of AI.
By 2040, we may realize that AI is not the omnipotent force we imagined.
We need to demystify AI and focus on practical, grounded progress.
